item.title:
Useful tip to cut time-to-first-token on longer prompts in the API: pre-warm the prompt cache.
Send your system prompt before the user prompt. Claude writes it to the cache, but skips generating any
item.description:
Useful tip to cut time-to-first-token on longer prompts in the API: pre-warm the prompt cache.
Send your system prompt before the user prompt. Claude writes it to the cache, but skips generating any output.
When the real user request lands, it'll hit a warm cache. https://t.co/6BdEzbamr2

item.title:
Claude Code weekly limits are increasing 50%, now through July 13.
Live now for all Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise users. https://t.co/5nU0XX4RZY
item.description:
Claude Code weekly limits are increasing 50%, now through July 13.
Live now for all Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise users. https://t.co/5nU0XX4RZY

item.title:
Starting June 15, paid Claude plans can claim a dedicated monthly credit for programmatic usage.
The credit covers usage of: - Claude Agent SDK - claude -p - Claude Code GitHub Actions - Third-party
item.description:
Starting June 15, paid Claude plans can claim a dedicated monthly credit for programmatic usage.
The credit covers usage of: - Claude Agent SDK - claude -p - Claude Code GitHub Actions - Third-party apps built on the Agent SDK

item.title: How do you keep Claude working until the job is done? Claude Code helps with this in a few ways, including one we shipped recently: /goal. https://t.co/QtVPmwoKct
item.description: How do you keep Claude working until the job is done? Claude Code helps with this in a few ways, including one we shipped recently: /goal. https://t.co/QtVPmwoKct

item.title: Fast mode for Claude Opus 4.7 is now available in research preview on the API and in Claude Code.
item.description: Fast mode for Claude Opus 4.7 is now available in research preview on the API and in Claude Code.

item.title: Agent view is built to run more sessions in parallel with less to keep in your head.
item.description: Agent view is built to run more sessions in parallel with less to keep in your head.

item.title: We're introducing the Claude Platform on AWS. This gives developers access to the same models and features as our native API, including Claude Managed Agents! Workloads, billing, and IAM stay inside A
item.description:
We're introducing the Claude Platform on AWS. This gives developers access to the same models and features as our native API, including Claude Managed Agents! Workloads, billing, and IAM stay inside AWS.
Learn more: https://t.co/JihmaHyOp2 https://t.co/XQKF9o5uiF

item.title: We're co-hosting a couple of hackathons in San Francisco next week. Come build with Claude 👇
item.description: We're co-hosting a couple of hackathons in San Francisco next week. Come build with Claude 👇

item.title: /radio https://t.co/OjF77ewUMN
item.description: /radio https://t.co/OjF77ewUMN

item.title:
RT @trq212: HTML is the new markdown.
I've stopped writing markdown files for almost everything and switched to using Claude Code to gene…
item.description:
RT @trq212: HTML is the new markdown.
I've stopped writing markdown files for almost everything and switched to using Claude Code to gene…

item.title:
Last week we shipped 50+ Claude Code reliability fixes. This week it's 60+ more.
Smoother long-running sessions, a more efficient agent loop, auth that works in more environments, and terminal fixes:
item.description:
Last week we shipped 50+ Claude Code reliability fixes. This week it's 60+ more.
Smoother long-running sessions, a more efficient agent loop, auth that works in more environments, and terminal fixes: 🧵

item.title:
That's a wrap on Code with Claude San Francisco! Clawd had an amazing time, and we hope you did too.
Thanks to everyone who came out and everyone who tuned in 🧡 https://t.co/erF62YZr7G
item.description:
That's a wrap on Code with Claude San Francisco! Clawd had an amazing time, and we hope you did too.
Thanks to everyone who came out and everyone who tuned in 🧡 https://t.co/erF62YZr7G

item.title:
Up next:
▪︎ 1:00PM - A conversation with our co-founders Dario Amodei and Daniela Amodei, moderated by Chief Product Officer Ami Vora ▪︎ 1:50PM - Watch how @bcherny and @jarredsumner build with Clau
item.description:
Up next:
▪︎ 1:00PM - A conversation with our co-founders Dario Amodei and Daniela Amodei, moderated by Chief Product Officer Ami Vora ▪︎ 1:50PM - Watch how @bcherny and @jarredsumner build with Claude Code

item.title: We love our community 🧡
item.description: We love our community 🧡

item.title: In Claude Managed Agents, we’ve added multiagent orchestration, an outcomes loop for rubric-driven self-improvement, dreaming for self-learning, & webhooks. https://t.co/Ip4pgLaEsp
item.description: In Claude Managed Agents, we’ve added multiagent orchestration, an outcomes loop for rubric-driven self-improvement, dreaming for self-learning, & webhooks. https://t.co/Ip4pgLaEsp

item.title:
Usage limits are up, effective today we're:
1) Doubling Claude Code's 5-hour limits for Pro, Max, Team and seat-based Enterprise plans
2) Removing peak hours limit reduction on Claude Code for Pro
item.description:
Usage limits are up, effective today we're:
1) Doubling Claude Code's 5-hour limits for Pro, Max, Team and seat-based Enterprise plans
2) Removing peak hours limit reduction on Claude Code for Pro and Max plans
3) Substantially raising our API rate limits for Opus models

item.title:
Code with Claude is happening now!
▪︎ 9:00AM - Keynote ▪︎ 10:30AM - What's new in Claude Code ▪︎ 11:15AM - Building on Claude at GitHub scale ▪︎ 12:00PM - Get to production faster with Managed Agen
item.description:
Code with Claude is happening now!
▪︎ 9:00AM - Keynote ▪︎ 10:30AM - What's new in Claude Code ▪︎ 11:15AM - Building on Claude at GitHub scale ▪︎ 12:00PM - Get to production faster with Managed Agents
All times PT. https://t.co/O4oygkSr2G

item.title:
Managing API keys is one of the top security concerns we hear from customers.
Today we’re introducing keyless auth for Claude Platform: authenticate via browser with the CLI, or let workloads use the
item.description:
Managing API keys is one of the top security concerns we hear from customers.
Today we’re introducing keyless auth for Claude Platform: authenticate via browser with the CLI, or let workloads use their existing cloud identity (AWS, GCP, Azure, or any OIDC token provider). https://t.co/uyuAB14lNJ

item.title:
The Built with Opus 4.7 Claude Code hackathon is a wrap!
Thank you to the 500 participants worldwide, and to @cerebral_valley for co-hosting.
Here's how the winners combined multi-agent orchestr
item.description:
The Built with Opus 4.7 Claude Code hackathon is a wrap!
Thank you to the 500 participants worldwide, and to @cerebral_valley for co-hosting.
Here's how the winners combined multi-agent orchestration, persistent memory, MCP tools, sandboxed execution, and smart prompt design 🧵

item.title:
Claude Code ships with a built-in skill for working with the Claude Platform.
Useful for model migrations, using API features (e.g., prompt caching), or onboarding to newer APIs like Claude Managed
item.description:
Claude Code ships with a built-in skill for working with the Claude Platform.
Useful for model migrations, using API features (e.g., prompt caching), or onboarding to newer APIs like Claude Managed Agents. https://t.co/nQjjku6STc

let me know if you have any white w…

item.title:
In the last four Claude Code CLI releases, we’ve shipped 50+ stability and performance fixes.
Faster resume, stable auth, lower memory, fewer hangs: 🧵
item.description:
In the last four Claude Code CLI releases, we’ve shipped 50+ stability and performance fixes.
Faster resume, stable auth, lower memory, fewer hangs: 🧵

item.title:
Claude Code can now send push notifications to your phone when a long task finishes or Claude needs your input.
Walk away from the terminal, we'll let you know when it's done. https://t.co/FavNOxThSa
item.description:
Claude Code can now send push notifications to your phone when a long task finishes or Claude needs your input.
Walk away from the terminal, we'll let you know when it's done. https://t.co/FavNOxThSa
